name: Kuzuhamon

signature_move.name: Ura Izuna
signature_move.description: Attacks the opponent with the kuda-gitsune carried on its waist.

description: A God Man Digimon that is said to be a Fox-species Digimon that lived long, and transformed to take on a humanoid form. It is said that only those among them of a high level are able to evolve to Sakuyamon , and they normally just evolve to Kuzuhamon. It is versed in ancient magic like Shinto , Onmyoudou , and Shugendou . A single kuda-gitsune lurks within the pipe it carries on the belt around its waist, and it is able to employ this kuda-gitsune to use it for things like attacking and gathering information. Its Signature Move is attacking the opponent with the kuda-gitsune carried on its waist ( Ura Izuna ). Its Special Move is spreading a purifying barrier with its " Shakujou " that exorcises evil spirits ( Taizoukai Mandara ).
